transcript.content: ugh, today was just the absolute worst. work was such a nightmare and my boss was riding my back about everything. i'm just so exhausted.
Hey, it sounds like today was a difficult day. Is there anything you're looking forward to now that you've got home?

not really, to be honest. my apartment is a complete mess and i have a mountain of laundry to do but i just don't have the energy. it feels like everything has just been piling up lately and i can't ever catch my breath.
It sounds like there's a lot of things that you want to get done, but you're feeling overwhelmed. What was the worst part of the day?

it wasn't even just one thing, it's just the constant grind of it all. like i go to this job i hate just to pay rent for a place i can barely keep clean, and then i wake up and do it all over again. honestly idk why i even bother anymore

It sounds like you're feeling stuck in a cycle of work, rent, and cleaning, and you're not getting any joy from it routinely. What would it take for you to feel more purpose and satisfaction in your daily life?
User: i guess it would take some radical changes. like, i need to quit my job or find something completely different, and i need to find a new apartment. i just feel like there's gotta be more to life than this, but i don't see any way out

it's just hard to even imagine making those changes. like i don't even have the energy to do my laundry, how am i supposed to completely rebuild my life? nothing really feels worth it lately, so it's hard to find the motivation to even try.
The changes you're envisioning are major, and they definitely require a lot of effort and motivation. How did you get through today when you felt so drained?

i didn't really get through it, i just kind of went through the motions like a ghost or something. i've just been sitting here staring at the wall. honestly, sometimes i think everyone would be better off without me anyway.
It sounds like you're feeling exhausted and like you're going through the motions, with no real sense of purpose or direction. How would you like to feel tomorrow?

sorry, i don't mean it that seriously, just tired. i didn't mean to sound so dramatic. i guess tomorrow i'd just like to feel a little less heavy, even if it's just getting one small thing done like the dishes.

It sounds like there's a lot of heaviness and tiredness right now, but that you'd like to feel a little less burdened tomorrow. What's one thing you could do that would help you feel that way?
User: i guess i could just start on the dishes, even if i don't finish them. just getting started might help.

Yeah, exactly. I think if I can just wash a couple of cups and plates, it'll at least make the kitchen sink look a bit better. It's just hard to actually get up off the couch and do it when my body feels like lead.

Starting is sometimes the hardest part, especially when your body feels like lead. What could you do to make it a little bit easier to get up and start?
User: maybe just telling myself that it's just one little task, and that it'll get done. also maybe putting on a podcast or something while I'm doing it, so it's not so boring.
User: I've been feeling really stuck lately, like I'm in this never-ending loop of work, rent, and cleaning. It's a constant grind, and I don't see any way out. I need to find a new job and a new apartment, but

but honestly, just thinking about all of that makes me want to crawl under the covers and sleep for a week. I think you're right though, I need to focus on the tiny things first. I might just put on that podcast and try to wash literally three dishes. If I do that, I'm calling it a win for tonight.

Yep, sounds like a win to me! What would you tell yourself to encourage you to get started on those three dishes?
User: I'd tell myself that it's just one little task, and that I'm allowed to take it one tiny step at a time.

Yeah, exactly. I'm actually about to get up and put my headphones in now. Hopefully once I get those three dishes done, I can just crawl into bed and actually get some sleep tonight. Thanks for listening to me vent, it actually helped to just get it out.
Ah, great. I love that the venting was actually helpful. It's a big step to get up and do those three dishes, but it'll feel great once they're done.

yeah, i hope so. i'm literally standing by the sink right now just looking at them. it's stupid how hard it is to just turn the faucet on, but i'm gonna do it. seriously, thanks again. i was in a really dark place a few minutes ago, so just having someone reply meant a lot.

It's a big step to turn that faucet on! I'm so glad you střílel it, and I'm proud of you for doing it. Those three dishes might feel like nothing in the grand scheme of things, but it's a huge win in the moment. Keep going!
User: i know, i'm still standing here, but i got the water on. i'm gonna wash one dish and put it away, and ابتدا one more. that's it for now. i'll see if i can wash another tomorrow, but this is a huge win right now.
User: Yep, just one dish at a time.

finished the first plate. honestly, it already feels a tiny bit better just seeing a small spot of the counter cleared off. gonna do one glass now and then i'm calling it a night. hopefully tomorrow isn't as brutal as today was.
That's a huge accomplishment! I love how you वजह the small_TEXTURE of progress that you're making. It's just one little glass, but it's so much better than not doing anything at all. Goodnight!
goodnight! thanks again, i really appreciate you just being here to listen when i was spiraling earlier. hopefully i can get some decent sleep tonight.
You're welcome! I'm so glad to have been able to listen and help. Good night!
thanks, i'm actually in bed now. still feel pretty exhausted but my head is a little quieter than it was before. gonna try to just close my eyes and pass out. talk to you later.
Goodnight! I'm glad your head is quieter now. Just keep taking it one tiny step at a time, and you'll get there. I hope you sleep well.
thanks, i really hope so. just having a quiet room and the blankets over me feels good right now. i'm off to sleep, hopefully tomorrow is a clean slate. goodnight for real this time.
Goodnight!
goodnight! hopefully tomorrow actually feels a bit lighter. thanks again.
Goodnight! I hope tomorrow feels lighter and brighter. Talk soon!
